title: Contributing
description: Guidelines for contributing code, documentation, and fixes to the CookieFarm project.

issues.report: Please open issues on the repository. Use clear titles, reproduction steps, expected vs actual behavior, and platform/environment details.
issues.security: If you found a security vulnerability, please disclose it privately to security@cookiefarm.example and do not open a public issue.

pull_request_guidelines.description: Include a short summary, linked issues, and testing steps. Keep PRs focused and small when possible.
pull_request_guidelines.reviewers: Assign at least one reviewer from the core team; include area-specific reviewers for large changes.

development.local_setup: See contributing/dev-setup.mdx for platform-specific dev environment, build and test commands.
development.code_style: Follow the repository's linting and formatting rules. Run linters and unit tests before opening a PR.

docs.style: Write concise pages, include examples, and link to authoritative references. Add frontmatter (title/description) to each page.

community.code_of_conduct: See contributing/index.mdx for the project's Code of Conduct and community expectations.
communication: Use the issue tracker for bugs and feature requests.
Use the project's chat or mailing list for real-time discussion (see repo README for links).
